changelog: Side-rail RIGHT-arrow → first card focus is now reliably fixed across every home section (Discovery, Streaming Services, Collections, Genres, Years, Themes & Moods, and Continue Watching).
BACK button on the home screen now shows the exit-confirm dialog (restored after an accidental regression).

Hush+ premium add-on suite is in a 'Coming Soon' teaser state — scroll through the pillars and the upcoming addon preview, but addons aren't launchable yet. They'll unlock automatically for existing members the moment Hush+ goes live.
Continue Watching is the default first home section when there's anything in progress — survives reboots, syncs across devices.
